extension.summary: Backfill missing age ratings in your Kodi library
extension.description: Automatically fills missing age certifications for movies and TV shows using TMDB, OMDB, and country-specific rating agencies. Supports 9 European and US rating systems. Runs in the background and checks periodically for items without certifications.
extension.news: v0.3.5 (2026-06-05) ~ Fixed kijkwijzer scraper being blocked on some systems ~ Scraper canaries now disable broken scrapers for the scan cycle ~ Fixed BBFC canary matching the wrong entry for Interstellar ~ Manual scan now runs canary checks before scanning
